chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, and delivery info

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: A single line within a Sales Order

triplets.subject: CUSTOMER_MASTER
triplets.object: Master record for all registered platform customers.

triplets.subject: TB_PRODUCT
triplets.object: Master catalogue of all products available for sale.

triplets.subject: SALES_ORDER_HDR
triplets.object: Header record for each customer sales order.

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A sales order line item is a single line in a sales order that specifies a product, the quantity ordered, and the unit price for that line.
synonyms: A single line within a Sales Order
Individual product lines within a sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
-------------------------------
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: Represents a category in the business domain, identified by a unique numeric ID and described by a human-readable name.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Category         → TB_CATEGORY | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO | | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: Master record for all registered platform customers, identified by the primary key CUST_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER
-------------------------------
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | - CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A registered platform user who has made at least one purchase and is the primary participant in e-commerce transactions (i.e., a customer).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | **Related Concepts**: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a custom

entities_post_resolution.name: Datetime
entities_post_resolution.definition: DATETIME represents a timestamp including date and time components, used for event-tracking fields such as account creation and payment confirmation.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Account creation timestamp | NO | | | PAYMENT_CONFIRMED_AT | DATETIME | Payment confirmation timestamp | YES | | | DELIVERED_AT | DATETIME | Delivery timestamp | YES | | | CREATED_AT | DATETIME | Order creation timestamp | NO | | | ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Sales Order Line Item is a single itemized entry in a sales order that references exactly one product, records the quantity and the unit price at the time of order (with extended amount calculated as quantity × unit price).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Examples**:
- Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each
- Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50 | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item.Product Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The product identifier associated with a specific line item within a sales order, indicating which product is included in that line item.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | | ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
-------------------------------
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_CATEGORY represents the hierarchical set of product categories, with CATEGORY_ID as the primary key and PARENT_CATEGORY_ID as the self-referential link to model the category tree.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | - PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference] | TB_CATEGORY
-------------------------------
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree. | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_PRODUCT
-------------------------------
**Description**: Master catalogue of all products available for sale. | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
-PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a financial transaction record associated with a Sales Order, where an order may have one or more Payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: PRODUCT_NAME represents the human-readable display name used to present a product to users, distinct from its internal unique identifier (PRODUCT_ID).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
-PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | **Key Attributes**:
- Human-readable product name

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A tangible or digital item offered for sale in the catalog, representing the basic sale unit that belongs to exactly one category.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform. | **Key Attributes**:
- Belongs to exactly one Category | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code | **Key Attributes**:
- Human-readable product name | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must belong to a valid category before being sold | **Business Rules**:
- Prices can change daily based on market conditions | **Business Rules**:
- Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference | **Synonyms**: item, article, goods, merchandise, SKU | **Related Concepts**: Category, Inventory, OrderLineItem | **Examples**:
- "Wireless Bluetooth Headphones - Black" (SKU: ELE-001234) | **Examples**:
- "Cotton T-Shirt - Medium, Blue" (SKU: CLO-002345) | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Un

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: SALES_ORDER_HDR represents the header record for a customer sales order, containing the order's unique identifier (ORDER_ID) and the customer reference (CUST_ID).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
-------------------------------
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order. | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Shipment is a unit of goods that originates from a single warehouse and is issued to fulfill exactly one Sales Order; a Sales Order may have one or more Shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price In Eur
entities_post_resolution.definition: The price charged per unit of a product, expressed in euros (EUR), as recorded at a point in time (for example, the unit price at the time of an order).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)

entities_post_resolution.name: Bigint
entities_post_resolution.definition: An integer numeric data type used to store identifier values (IDs) in relational database columns, with BIGINT as the canonical form.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | | CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO | | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | | CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Column Data Type Declaration
entities_post_resolution.definition: A data type specification used to define the storage type and size/precision for a database table column, covering DECIMAL(p,s) and VARCHAR(n) variants.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | | TOTAL_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Total order value | NO | | | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | | | EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO | | | FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO | | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO | | | PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | | SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Refund: a reimbursement of money to a customer, typically issued when an order is cancelled or as part of a product return.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Items Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Business Context**: Orders are created when customers complete checkout. They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Business Context**: Orders are created when customers complete checkout. They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information.

entities_post_resolution.name: E Commerce System
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Formal Transaction Document
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products.

entities_post_resolution.name: Moment Of Ordering
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

entities_post_resolution.definition:

- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type

**Business Rules**:

entities_post_resolution.name: Not Yet Shipped
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped

entities_post_resolution.name: Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

- Prices can change daily based on market conditions

entities_post_resolution.name: Tangible Or Digital Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: **Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: **Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform.

entities_post_resolution.name: Units Ordered
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Key Attributes**:

- Quantity of units ordered

**Business Rules**:
- Must belong to a valid category before being sold
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, region, account status, and the timestamp when the customer was created.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products including identifiers, SKUs, names, category linkage, pricing, and whether the product is currently active.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores product category information, including hierarchical relationships between categories through a parent category reference.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header information for sales orders, including customer reference, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timestamp, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual line items for each order, including the product, quantity, unit price, and line total amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for creation and confirmation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores data about individual shipments linked to sales orders, including the shipment identifier, associated order, warehouse, shipment timestamp, tracking information, and current shipment status.
